cold_start: ~3–8 s from stopped; ~300 ms from suspended snapshot
name: Fly Machines
notes: Fly.io GPU Machines are scheduled to be fully deprecated on July 31, 2026.
pricing_model: Per-second billing on running CPU/RAM preset; stopped machines billed for rootfs storage
summary: Fly Machines are VMs managed through a REST API, built from container images and executed inside Firecracker microVMs across Fly.io's global infrastructure. They expose lifecycle controls (start, stop, suspend, resume) and can autostart on inbound traffic through the Fly Proxy. Developers use them to deploy containerized workloads—including AI agent sandboxes—that need fast boot, per-second billing, and global placement.
